title: RSS Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and patterns for working with RSS feeds.

commands.command:
<rss version="2.0">
  <channel>
    <title>Example RSS Feed</title>
    <link>http://www.example.com</link>
    <description>This is an example RSS feed</description>
    <item>
      <title>Example Item</title>
      <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
      <description>This is an example item description</description>
    </item>
  </channel>
</rss>
commands.description: Define an RSS feed with a channel and items
commands.scenario: Define an RSS feed with a channel and items

commands.command:
<item>
  <title>Example Item</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
  <description>This is an example item description</description>
  <pubDate>Mon, 06 Sep 2021 16:45:00 +0000</pubDate>
</item>
commands.description: Include a publication date in an RSS item
commands.scenario: Include a publication date in an RSS item

commands.command:
<item>
  <title>Example Item</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
  <description>This is an example item description</description>
  <guid>http://www.example.com/example-item</guid>
</item>
commands.description: Add a GUID to an RSS item for unique identification
commands.scenario: Add a GUID to an RSS item for unique identification

commands.command:
<channel>
  <title>Example RSS Feed</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com</link>
  <description>This is an example RSS feed</description>
  <language>en-us</language>
</channel>
commands.description: Set the language of the RSS feed
commands.scenario: Set the language of the RSS feed

commands.command:
<channel>
  <title>Example RSS Feed</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com</link>
  <description>This is an example RSS feed</description>
  <lastBuildDate>Mon, 06 Sep 2021 16:45:00 +0000</lastBuildDate>
</channel>
commands.description: Specify the last build date of the RSS feed
commands.scenario: Specify the last build date of the RSS feed

commands.command:
<channel>
  <title>Example RSS Feed</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com</link>
  <description>This is an example RSS feed</description>
  <managingEditor>editor@example.com</managingEditor>
</channel>
commands.description: Define the managing editor of the RSS feed
commands.scenario: Define the managing editor of the RSS feed

commands.command:
<item>
  <title>Example Item</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
  <description>This is an example item description</description>
  <media:thumbnail url="http://www.example.com/image.jpg" />
</item>
commands.description: Add a media thumbnail to an RSS item
commands.scenario: Add a media thumbnail to an RSS item

commands.command:
<item>
  <title>Example Item</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
  <description>This is an example item description</description>
  <enclosure url="http://www.example.com/audio.mp3" length="12345" type="audio/mpeg" />
</item>
commands.description: Include an enclosure for audio or video in an RSS item
commands.scenario: Include an enclosure for audio or video in an RSS item

commands.command:
<item>
  <title>Example Item</title>
  <link>http://www.example.com/example-item</link>
  <description>This is an example item description</description>
  <category>Technology</category>
  <category>News</category>
</item>
commands.description: Add categories to an RSS item
commands.scenario: Add categories to an RSS item
